name: textual-tui-widgets
description: Textual TUI widgets pattern: Static for pipeline bar with reactive properties, DataTable for agent/subtask tables with custom Message emission, RichLog for agent output. Tests use async with App().run_test() pattern.

content: pytest-asyncio test pattern for async concurrency: Use asyncio.Lock for thread-safe counters in tests, patch methods with context manager, test concurrency limits by running start() loop briefly then calling stop()
